title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: DeepSeek released V4, a new flagship language model that achieves significant reductions in inference compute and cost. The model represents a step forward in making LLMs more efficient and capable simultaneously, contributing to the competitive landscape between open and closed AI labs.
